This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] div role is listbox
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is option (in div listbox)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is group (in div listbox)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is option (in group, in div listbox)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] ul role is listbox
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] li role is option (in ul listbox)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] orphaned option outside the context of listbox
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
